blobClientMock
    .Setup(blob => blob.DownloadToAsync(It.IsAny<Stream>()))
    .Callback<Stream>(stream =>
    {
        byte[] bytes = System.Text.Encoding.ASCII.GetBytes(blobContent);
        stream.Write(bytes, 0, bytes.Length);
        stream.Position = 0;
    })
    .Returns(Task.FromResult((Azure.Response)null!));
